DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND RESPONSES TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF 536.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. (610/CHAN)
